special_mechanics.name: Climber
special_mechanics.description: Climbs vertically but falls down if hits overhang

special_mechanics.name: Floater
special_mechanics.description: Uses parachute to fall safely from heights

special_mechanics.name: Bomber
special_mechanics.description: Explodes after 5-second timer, destroys destructible landscape

special_mechanics.name: Blocker
special_mechanics.description: Stands still and reverses direction of other lemmings on contact

special_mechanics.name: Basher
special_mechanics.description: Tunnels horizontally, cannot break through steel

special_mechanics.name: Miner
special_mechanics.description: Tunnels diagonally downwards, cannot break through steel

special_mechanics.name: Digger
special_mechanics.description: Tunnels directly downwards, cannot break through steel

tier_notes: Tier 2: Puzzle game focused on level design and skill assignment rather than precise movement mechanics. No detailed physics documentation available. Lemmings follow predetermined paths with simple directional logic (walk forward, turn on obstacle/edge, reverse on blocker contact). Movement parameters not quantified in available sources.
